name: Wasabi Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stainless steel bowl, whisk together the following:
- 1/2 cup wasabi powder
- 1 tablespoon mirin (sweet rice wine)
- 1 teaspoon sugar
2. Gradually add water to create a loose puree.
3. Whisk in the neutral oil until combined.
Note: This recipe does not specify an exact amount of oil or water needed. Adjust quantities as desired for your taste preferences.
